rules.title: Shell execution pattern detected
rules.why_it_matters: This environment contains patterns that can execute local commands. That increases the trust required before running the agent.
recommended_actions: Review the command source and arguments before running.
Disable command execution tools if they are not required.
recommended_alternatives: Use a read-only tool or sandboxed command runner where possible.
rules.migration_instruction: Disable shell execution for this agent unless the task explicitly requires it.

rules.title: Remote download pattern detected
rules.why_it_matters: Remote downloads can introduce new code, tools, skills or configuration into the agent environment.
recommended_actions: Pin versions or commit hashes instead of using moving branches.
recommended_alternatives: Use a bundled or verified package source when available.
rules.migration_instruction: Replace unpinned remote downloads with pinned release assets or commit hashes.

rules.title: Credential or environment variable reference detected
rules.why_it_matters: Agent tools, skills or MCP servers may inherit credentials from environment variables or local files.
recommended_actions: Use scoped credentials for agent environments.
Remove unused secrets before running the agent.
recommended_alternatives: Use a dedicated low-privilege token for this agent.
rules.migration_instruction: Move high-privilege secrets out of the scanned agent environment and use scoped replacement tokens.

rules.title: Instruction override pattern detected
rules.why_it_matters: Instruction override patterns can change how an agent follows rules and handles sensitive context.
recommended_actions: Remove hidden or unnecessary override instructions.
recommended_alternatives: Use explicit, narrow tool permissions instead of broad instruction overrides.
rules.migration_instruction: Replace broad override instructions with specific, reviewable tool policies.
